prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for formaldehyde (H2C=O, 4 atoms: O, C, H, H) at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard', density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Mulliken partial charges were used for the finite-difference Fukui approximation. N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). All three SCF calculations converged. Charge conservation: sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. Integrity: trustworthy = true. Most electrophilic site: C (atom 2), f+ = 0.70839. Most nucleophilic site: O (atom 1), f− = 0.46742. Dual descriptor on C = +0.59595 (strongly electrophilic). No warnings were raised by the engine. Headline value reported is the maximum f+ (carbonyl carbon).
